name: Pennsylvania Dutch Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp. Remove from skillet.
2. Add onion to 1 tablespoon of bacon drippings. Cook until tender.
3. Blend in cornstarch, salt, and mustard.
4. Drain beans, reserving 1/2 cup liquid. Stir reserved bean liquid into the mixture.
5. Cook, stirring constantly until thickened and translucent.
6. Blend in sugar and vinegar.
7. Add beans. Heat through.
8. Top with crumbled bacon and chopped egg.
